KIVI-style same-condition reimplementation. Per-channel K (INT4) + per-token V (INT4). Implemented by monkey-patching apply_rotary_pos_emb to quant-dequant K post-RoPE, and v_proj to quant-dequant V. NOT the official KIVI repo (no custom CUDA kernels).

KIVI-style same-condition reimplementation. Per-channel K (INT3) + per-token V (INT3). Implemented by monkey-patching apply_rotary_pos_emb to quant-dequant K post-RoPE, and v_proj to quant-dequant V. NOT the official KIVI repo (no custom CUDA kernels).

KIVI-style same-condition reimplementation. Per-channel K (INT2) + per-token V (INT2). Implemented by monkey-patching apply_rotary_pos_emb to quant-dequant K post-RoPE, and v_proj to quant-dequant V. NOT the official KIVI repo (no custom CUDA kernels).
CARE-KV paper-best (carekv_stored, joint+normalize, cached, SK=2 SV=4 RK=2 RV=2).
CARE-KV paper-best + adaptive_score read budget (rel_threshold=0.05). Confirmed on WT-2 N=4 at rel=0.05.

[unsupported] Pre-RoPE K quantization requires a K storage path opposite of CARE-KV's post-RoPE invariant. Needs a new K-store-mode switch through cache.py + llama_patch.py + the prefill loop. Estimated 1–2 days of focused implementation work. Blocked from this turn's scope; see `sota_official_integration_status.md` for the longer writeup.

[unsupported] Per-token mixed precision (KIVI-style is per-token in *scale*, but MiKV is per-token in *bit-width*) requires extending the pack/unpack pipeline to honor per-token bit-widths and a saliency pass at prefill. Estimated 1–2 days of focused work. Blocked from this turn's scope; see `sota_official_integration_status.md`.

[unsupported] Saliency-aware mixed precision shares the per-token bit-width plumbing gap with MiKV-style. CARE-KV already has the saliency computation (via the residual router's joint score), so the saliency *selection* is cheap; the *storage* needs new code. Estimated 1–2 days; blocked from this turn's scope. See `sota_official_integration_status.md`.
